title: No Creepers
description: A mod that completely removes creepers
body:
![NO CREEPERS FINALLY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa201f799db2e1836a21dfd3d7ffd3bd5cfc9be1.png)

# NO CREEPERS

## Have you ever wanted to delete Creepers from existence?

This is the mod for **you**.

---

### No Creepers

This is like my [No Pigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-pigs) mod and my [No Skeletons](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-skeletons) mod.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Creepers will not spawn.  
Naturally, manually, or with spawn eggs.

</details>

---
